subgoals.description: Search for and compile a list of suitable venues in Edinburgh with key details such as location, capacity, and amenities.
subgoals.success_criterion: A list of at least three venues with their details is obtained.

subgoals.description: Draft a professional flyer using the researched venue details, including event information, contact details, and visual elements.
subgoals.success_criterion: A complete flyer draft is created with all necessary information and formatted appropriately.
